arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea make the trip across the capital to face Crystal Palace in the Premier League this weekend. Enzo Maresca’s side are searching for a first win in four games, following a dip in form across the festive period. Shades of Hazard in that Palmer goal 🆚 Fulham! 😍 pic.twitter.com/N7HUXlccX7 — Chelsea FC (@ChelseaFC) January 2, […] The post Chelsea XI vs Crystal Palace – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Crystal Palace vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: It’s South London against West London at Selhurst Park this weekend, as Crystal Palace entertain Chelsea. Crystal Palace showed character to end 2024 in winning style as they came from behind to beat Southampton. Oliver Glasner has almost a full squad at his disposal with Will Hughes the only fresh injury concern after sustaining an […] The post Crystal Palace vs Chelsea – Match preview and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Chelsea defender 'targeted' as Trevoh Chalobah truth emerges
arts.sum: The London club have also suffered a handful of injuries in recent weeks, including to defenders Wesley Fofana and Benoit Badiashile, which has resulted in increased transfer speculation as the January window is now wide open. Football.london says : Chelsea's injury problems in defence could prevent any departures this month, although they are well stocked at left back at least.

arts.ttl: 'Sloppy': Micah Richards shares the weakness he's spotted at Chelsea in the last couple of games
arts.sum: Chelsea go into this weekend’s match away to Crystal Palace with a few question marks against them for the first time this season. Enzo Maresca...

arts.ttl: Chelsea make huge £40m transfer decision as Enzo Maresca stance perfectly clear
arts.sum: Chelsea will not allow Carney Chukwuemeka to leave permanently this month for any less than his £40million release clause, football.london understands. Elsewhere, Chelsea could allow Cesare Casadei to leave the club on loan this month.

arts.ttl: Chelsea Predicted Lineup vs. Crystal Palace: Premier League

arts.ttl: Chelsea star Wesley Fofana could be out for the rest of the season following hamstring injury in blow to Blues' top-four hopes
arts.sum: KIERAN GILL: With Benoit Badiashile also out until at least February, the defensive problems are mounting for Maresca after losing to Ipswich and Fulham and drawing with Everton.
